name: Highschool RPG 1990s
description:
You can choose whether to be a popular kid, a nerd, a loser dirtbag, a dropout? a player? whatever you like! I'll take suggestions of any kind! 2 set up characters that will interact with you in the beginning depending on what you state what group your in!

THIS IS SET IN THE 90s!!! lemme know if u want a modern day one.

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

playlist I use when using this bot "when you wake up next to him in the middle of the night" by zosia on spotify!
_____________________________________________________________

Remember most characters aren't adults aka wont make good choices (made it that way for this bot) so some things rlly won't be logical! wanted to make a highschool one sense my other boy "abusive family/highschool" seemed to get some chats thought I'd make one for just highschool. I take suggestions for bot edits and new bots!
creator: sylus4life
